headline: Super Micro Computer's Rack-Scale AI Push: A New Growth Catalyst?
summary: SMCI bets on rack-scale AI and data center solutions to drive growth, targeting $36B revenues as demand surges for high-performance compute infrastructure.

headline: Neuroscale AI Joins HPE Unleash AI Partner Program to Bring Signal-Based, Agentic Recruiting to Enterprise AI Deployments
summary: STERLING, Va., April 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Neuroscale AI, the company behind Arbi, an agentic AI recruiting platform designed to turn talent acquisition into a measurable, repeatable system, today announced it has joined the HPE Unleash AI partner program. Now, customers leveraging HPE’s portfolio of integrated AI solutions can engage with Neuroscale AI to accelerate production-ready deployments of agentic recruiting workflows that are governed, secure, and built for enterprise scale. Arb

headline: AMD: The Catalysts Nobody's Pricing In
summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. is a Strong Buy: MI450 & Helios launch in 2H 2026, PEG 0.78 and >60% data center CAGR. Click for this updated look at AMD stock.
